canonical_definition: Natural Backdoor Attacks (NBA), a baseline backdoor attack method that injects fixed, non-learnable 'natural triggers' like rain or a whistle at the beginning of an audio waveform.
papers: Distribution Prompting: Understanding the Expressivity of Language Models Through the Next-Token Distributions They Can Produce
Med-VRAgent: A Framework for Medical Visual Reasoning-Enhanced Agents
